reasoning: The fetch_ts_yfinance tool provided a combined statistical estimate of 0.60 for the stock closing above the threshold by the first resolution date, based on the linear trend model and seasonal priors. Following the explicit instructions to use this statistical estimate as the primary probability anchor and to account for weekly stock moves being largely unpredictable, I set the base probability at 0.60.
